name: OBSERVATION CARE DISCHARGE DAY MANAGEMENT (THIS CODE IS TO BE UTILIZED TO REPORT ALL SERVICES PROVIDED TO A PATIENT ON DISCHARGE FROM OUTPATIENT HOSPITAL "OBSERVATION STATUS" IF THE DISCHARGE IS ON OTHER THAN THE INITIAL DATE OF "OBSERVATION STATUS." TO REPORT SERVICES TO A PATIENT DESIGNATED AS "OBSERVATION STATUS" OR "INPATIENT STATUS" AND DISCHARGED ON THE SAME DATE, USE THE CODES FOR OBSERVATION OR INPATIENT CARE SERVICES [INCLUDING ADMISSION AND DISCHARGE SERVICES, 99234-99236 AS APPROPRIATE.])

descriptions: OBSERVATION CARE DISCHARGE DAY MANAGEMENT (THIS CODE IS TO BE UTILIZED TO REPORT ALL SERVICES PROVIDED TO A PATIENT ON DISCHARGE FROM OUTPATIENT HOSPITAL "OBSERVATION STATUS" IF THE DISCHARGE IS ON OT
HC PRO OBSERVATION CARE DISCHARGE MANAGEMENT

OBSERVATION CARE DISCHARGE DAY MANAGEMENT (THIS CODE IS TO BE UTILIZED TO REPORT ALL SERVICES PROVIDED TO A PATIENT ON DISCHARGE FROM OUTPATIENT HOSPITAL "OBSERVATION STATUS" IF THE DISCHARGE IS ON OTHER THAN THE INITIAL DATE OF "OBSERVATION STATUS." TO REPORT SERVICES TO A PATIENT DESIGNATED AS "OBSERVATION STATUS" OR "INPATIENT STATUS" AND DISCHARGED ON THE SAME DATE, USE THE CODES FOR OBSERVATION OR INPATIENT CARE SERVICES [INCLUDING ADMISSION AND DISCHARGE SERVICES, 99234-99236 AS APPROPRIATE.])
